name: MiniMax
description: MiniMax — Chinese AI lab offering foundation models for text, audio, and video generation accessible via API.

seo.title: MiniMax — AI API / SDK for Developers
seo.meta_description: MiniMax: MiniMax — Chinese AI lab offering foundation models for text, audio, and video generation accessible via API.

when_to_use: Deploying MiniMax consumer AI apps (Talkie, Hailuo) for users
Building character AI companion products on MiniMax's platform
Generating short-form AI video content with Hailuo Video
Creating voice cloning and personalized TTS features

pros: Frontier Chinese lab investing heavily in multimodal
Text, audio and video models in one family
cons: Access via API often bundled with Chinese cloud
Benchmarks don't always match production use
review.verdict: Credible Chinese multimodal lab worth tracking; due diligence needed before betting production on it.
review.best_for: Teams exploring Chinese multimodal foundation models for creative workflows
review.not_for: Regulated products requiring maximum vendor transparency
